title: Annealed variational mixtures for disease subtyping and biomarker discovery.
publicationName: Statistical applications in genetics and molecular biology
journalName: Statistical applications in genetics and molecular biology
snippet: Cluster analyses of high-dimensional data are often hampered by the presence of large numbers of variables that do not provide relevant information, as well as the perennial issue of choosing an appropriate number of clusters. These challenges are frequently encountered when analysing omics datasets, such as in molecular precision medicine, where a key goal...
